title: Frisians in Peril
actors: Friedrich Kayßler, Helene Fehdmer, Valéry Inkijinoff
plot: The peaceful life of a village of Frisions by the river Volga is troubled by the arrival of a troop of Red Guards led by the inhuman commissary Tschernoff.Not only content to mistreat the brave villagers led by no-nonsense young m...
